tagged_story_for_tts: "Logic isn’t a scalpel—it’s a meat grinder. You think it cuts clean? It pulverizes. The myth: Logic is neutral, a pure tool for truth. The reality? It’s a weaponized framework that justifies atrocities when wielded by the ruthless. The Holocaust’s bureaucracy ran on impeccable syllogisms (Arendt, Eichmann in Jerusalem); slavery was defended with Aristotelian categorizations; AI ‘ethics’ still use cost-benefit analyses to justify collateral damage. The hidden cost? Logic doesn’t reveal truth—it retrofits it to serve power. Every premise you accept unexamined is a Trojan horse for someone else’s agenda. Here’s your test: Name one belief you’ve never backtested against its own assumptions. Can’t? Congratulations, you’re not a thinker—you’re a node in someone else’s algorithm."
